headline: Up 14.81% in a Year, COWZ Proves You Don’t Need Apple
summary: The Pacer US Cash Cows 100 ETF (CBOE:COWZ) is having a solid 2026, up 6.4% year to date and 14.81% over the past year through July 6. Yet a fund built expressly to own America’s biggest cash machines holds zero shares of Apple, arguably the most famous cash generator on the planet. That contradiction is ... Up 14.81% in a Year, COWZ Proves You Don’t Need Apple

headline: ConocoPhillips: The Glut Makes It A Sell
summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) downgraded to Sell as oil oversupply hits demand.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on ConocoPhillips, Lowers Price Target to $146
summary: Mizuho  analyst Nitin Kumar   maintains ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $150 to $146.
